_comment: Deeper creativity-selection pipeline for execute_got_graph (task_name='custom'). Ports the 'beyond the paper' design natively into GoT: set-level divergence with an explore/commit controller, set-RELATIVE quality (judging candidates in isolation is a weak signal), Pareto selection with an anti-Goodhart floor, and a concurrent multi-persona final judge. All ops are async/concurrent and cluster in a single call, so they stay within MCP timeouts against slow remote models. Novelty method credited in-code to the ACL 2026 creativity-evaluation paper; implementation is original and API-only.

initial_parameters.original: Propose an unconventional, specific way to get strangers in a neighborhood to start talking to each other
